prev24: Completed 450m RC drilling on prospect zone 1. Geological logging completed. Sample dispatch arranged.

earthworks.comments: Access roads prepared for core rig movement

dailyTasks: Continue RC drilling zone B. Maintain core hole integrity. Prepare core shed for sample storage.
safetyFocus: Steep slope awareness. Ensure all personnel wearing harnesses in elevated work areas.
highRisk: Weather: potential thunderstorms pm. Drill site on slope requiring continuous slope stability monitoring.
generalBusiness: Geological contractor arriving 2pm for rapid logging. Lunch truck scheduled 12:30pm.

prev24: Advanced to 600m total. Geological logging complete. All samples packaged and ready for courier.

earthworks.comments: Minor erosion on southern slope - filled and compacted

dailyTasks: Continue RC program. Core rig mobilization if approved. Prepare waste rock pad.
safetyFocus: New crew member induction completed. Confined space protocols briefed.
highRisk: None identified. All equipment functioning normally.
generalBusiness: Core rig operator confirmed for 2pm arrival. Samples couriered successfully.

prev24: Core rig operational. Advanced 200m with core. Quality recovery excellent at 98%. Mineralogy visible.

earthworks.comments: Core shed secured. Waste storage monitored

dailyTasks: Complete core program target 850m. Geological assessment underway. Prepare assay submission.
safetyFocus: Core handling safety refresher completed. Heavy lifting protocols reviewed.
highRisk: Core rig stability on slope - additional supports installed.
generalBusiness: Geologist confirmed high-grade zone. Assay lab prioritized our samples.

prev24: Reached 850m target. Core extraction completed. All samples catalogued and stored. Drill maintained.

earthworks.comments: Slope monitoring complete. No movement detected.

dailyTasks: Prepare core rig for demob. Clean and inventory all equipment. Final site survey.
safetyFocus: Demobilization procedures. Equipment secure during transport.
highRisk: None. Site securing and cleanup proceeding as planned.
generalBusiness: Final assay results expected tomorrow. Preliminary findings show promising grade.

prev24: Core rig fully demobilized. Equipment transported and logged. Site cleaned. Environmental samples submitted.

earthworks.comments: Waste pad capped. Access roads regraded.

dailyTasks: Final site inspection. Documentation of all activities. Prepare handover to operations.
safetyFocus: Site induction review for handover team. No active hazards remaining.
generalBusiness: Final assay results received. Excellent grades confirmed. Presentation scheduled for 2pm.

prev24: Site handover completed with operations team. All documentation transferred. Equipment audit completed.

earthworks.comments: Site ready for next phase development

dailyTasks: Final compliance check. Site closure report preparation. Recover any remaining consumables.
safetyFocus: Final safety walk-through completed. No issues identified.
generalBusiness: Management very pleased with results. Planning follow-up drilling phase.

actions.text: Submit site closure report to regulator
